feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing UI/font/contrast improvements with associated files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of many frontend source files for reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color tokens and global theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the Inter font and mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app managing authentication, navigation between calendar/daily/settings, background images, and planner store.
frontend/src/components/animations/ViewT: Wrapper adding directional enter transitions to views based on key changes.
frontend/src/components/background/Backg: Background component loading themed images with gradient overlays and fallback handling.
frontend/src/features/auth/LoginScreen.t: Login page using Internet Identity with informational sections and a scenic background.
frontend/src/features/background/monthBa: Static month-to-image mapping with helpers to get monthly or fallback background URLs.
frontend/src/features/planner/DailyPlanV: Displays tasks for a selected date split by time of day and provides inputs to add, edit, and delete tasks.
Provides utilities for generating calendar grids and formatting dates for ISO storage and display.
frontend/src/features/planner/MonthlyCal: Renders a navigable monthly calendar grid and triggers date selection with visual transitions.
frontend/src/features/planner/storage.ts: Handles loading, saving, validating, and clearing planner data in localStorage with version checks.
frontend/src/features/planner/TaskItem.t: Shows an individual task with inline edit and delete controls including animations and validation.
frontend/src/features/planner/types.ts: Defines task, day plan, and planner data types including time-of-day categories.
frontend/src/features/planner/usePlanner: Implements React state management for planner data with functions to add, update, delete, and persist tasks.
frontend/src/features/profile/ProfileVie: React settings/profile page allowing theme and motion preferences, planner data import/export, and data clearing.
frontend/src/features/settings/preferenc: Utilities for reading, writing, and applying theme and motion preferences via localStorage and DOM classes.
frontend/src/features/settings/usePrefer: React hook managing theme and motion state, syncing changes to storage and applying them to the document.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on the user’s Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Internet Identity auth context and provider handling login, stored identity loading, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles plus custom theming variables, animations, and transition effects for UI interactions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry that mounts React with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling dark mode and plugins.
project_state.json: JSON file describing the project's current state, including version info, architectural notes, issues, and a list of existing front-end feature definitions. It outlines requirements for a LocalStorage‑based daily planner with calendar, notes, theming, and navigation features.
